blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The exploratory step successfully validates the persona scenario of transferring bookings between locations.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided in the linked use case clearly outlines the functionality of transferring bookings between locations when a specific condition (e.g., a broken X-ray machine) occurs. The expected result of confirming the scenario behavior or producing a clear failure report aligns with the operational requirements of the system, as detailed in the use case. Additionally, prior steps have passed, indicating that the system is functioning correctly in related scenarios, further supporting the validation of this exploratory step.
